scripts.build: bun build sidebar/main.tsx panel-a/main.tsx panel-b/main.tsx --outdir ../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist --entry-naming [dir]/index.[ext] --minify && node -e "fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('shared/logo.png','../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist/logo.png')"
